special_mechanics.name: Stamina System
special_mechanics.description: Jennifer can walk and run, but running reduces stamina. She may recover stamina by sitting on the floor. Portrait changes based on stamina level.

special_mechanics.name: Panic Mode
special_mechanics.description: When confronted by Scissorman, game enters 'panic mode'. Depending on health status, Jennifer may trip, slow down, and eventually be killed.

special_mechanics.name: Escape Mechanic
special_mechanics.description: If caught by Scissorman, player can rapidly press button to attempt escape.

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Empirical/Qualitative only. Clock Tower is a point-and-click survival horror game with cursor-based controls, not a traditional platformer. No precise physics parameters are documented in available sources. Movement is qualitative (walk/run with stamina drain) rather than numerically defined. Game design focuses on exploration, puzzle-solving, and evasion mechanics rather than precise physics.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Clock Tower (SNES) article
